scripts.build:admin: npm ci --prefix admin-ui && npm run build --prefix admin-ui
scripts.deploy: npm run build:admin && npm run predeploy:worker && ./scripts/with-cf-admin-env.sh npx wrangler deploy --install-skills && npm run cms:post-deploy
scripts.deploy:plain: npm run predeploy:worker && wrangler deploy && npm run cms:post-deploy
scripts.cms:bootstrap: npm run cms:generate-seed && npm run db:seed:cms:full && npm run db:seed:tee
scripts.db:install:agentsam-workflows: npm run db:migrate:agentsam-workflows && npm run db:seed:agentsam-workflows
scripts.db:install:agentsam-studio: npm run db:migrate:agentsam-workflows-v2 && npm run db:seed:agentsam-workflows-studio && npm run db:seed:agentsam-workflow-nodes-studio
scripts.db:migrate:agentsam-ai: ./scripts/with-cf-admin-env.sh npx wrangler d1 execute fuelnfreetime --remote --file db/migrate-agentsam-ai.sql
scripts.db:seed:agentsam-ai: ./scripts/with-cf-admin-env.sh npx wrangler d1 execute fuelnfreetime --remote --file db/seed-agentsam-ai.sql
scripts.db:install:agentsam-ai: npm run db:migrate:agentsam-ai && npm run db:seed:agentsam-ai
scripts.db:migrate:agentsam-tools: ./scripts/with-cf-admin-env.sh npx wrangler d1 execute fuelnfreetime --remote --file db/migrate-agentsam-tools.sql
scripts.db:seed:agentsam-tools: ./scripts/with-cf-admin-env.sh npx wrangler d1 execute fuelnfreetime --remote --file db/seed-agentsam-tools.sql
scripts.db:install:agentsam-tools: npm run db:migrate:agentsam-tools && npm run db:seed:agentsam-tools
scripts.db:patch:agentsam-tools-scope: ./scripts/with-cf-admin-env.sh npx wrangler d1 execute fuelnfreetime --remote --file db/patch-agentsam-tools-fnf-scope.sql
scripts.db:migrate:agentsam-analytics: ./scripts/with-cf-admin-env.sh npx wrangler d1 execute fuelnfreetime --remote --file db/migrate-agentsam-analytics.sql
scripts.db:migrate:agentsam-conversations: ./scripts/with-cf-admin-env.sh npx wrangler d1 execute fuelnfreetime --remote --file db/migrate-agentsam-conversations.sql
scripts.db:migrate:agentsam-attachments: ./scripts/with-cf-admin-env.sh npx wrangler d1 execute fuelnfreetime --remote --file db/migrate-agentsam-attachments.sql
scripts.db:migrate:agentsam-prompts: ./scripts/with-cf-admin-env.sh npx wrangler d1 execute fuelnfreetime --remote --file db/migrate-agentsam-prompts.sql
scripts.db:seed:agentsam-prompts: ./scripts/with-cf-admin-env.sh npx wrangler d1 execute fuelnfreetime --remote --file db/seed-agentsam-prompts.sql
scripts.db:install:agentsam-prompts: npm run db:migrate:agentsam-prompts && npm run db:seed:agentsam-prompts
scripts.db:migrate:agentsam-compaction: ./scripts/with-cf-admin-env.sh npx wrangler d1 execute fuelnfreetime --remote --file db/migrate-agentsam-compaction.sql
scripts.db:seed:ctx-fuelnfreetime: ./scripts/with-cf-admin-env.sh npx wrangler d1 execute fuelnfreetime --remote --file=db/migrate-agentsam-project-context.sql && ./scripts/with-cf-admin-env.sh npx wrangler d1 execute fuelnfreetime --remote --file=db/seed-ctx-fuelnfreetime-worker.sql
scripts.db:seed:ctx-fuelnfreetime:all: npm run db:seed:ctx-fuelnfreetime && npm run db:seed:ctx-fuelnfreetime:iam
scripts.r2:cors: ./scripts/with-cf-admin-env.sh npx wrangler r2 bucket cors set fuelnfreetime --file=scripts/r2-cors.json -y
